name: ivrejchik-claude_skills_ivrejchik
description: Custom Claude Code skills by ivrejchik — parallel team orchestration, Airflow DAG builder, and more

plugins.name: solve
plugins.description: Spawn a full parallel dev team to solve any problem. Acts as team lead — researches the problem, plans roles and tasks, then unleashes parallel agent team members.

plugins.name: add-dag
plugins.description: Build a new Airflow DAG from a brief idea, .py file, or .md spec. Launches 6 parallel research agents to analyze the codebase, then implements the DAG following existing patterns on a feature branch with tests.
